description: Semi-realistic top-down 4-direction RPG character, base movement/action set: idle-down, walk-down, walk-up, walk-right, walk-left.

states.name: idle-down
states.action: Facing-down idle loop: a tiny blink or breathing shift between two nearly identical poses. Proportion-appropriate motion for semi-realistic build: balanced stylized anatomy, moderate realistic stride.
requirements: Character faces straight down (toward the viewer) in both frames.
Keep the pose, silhouette, and palette essentially identical between the two frames aside from the subtle idle motion.
Feet should stay planted.
Proportion-appropriate motion for semi-realistic build: balanced stylized anatomy, moderate realistic stride.

states.name: walk-down
states.action: Facing-down walk cycle: alternating stride through legs and arms only, viewed from the front. Proportion-appropriate motion for semi-realistic build: balanced stylized anatomy, moderate realistic stride.
requirements: Character faces and moves straight down (toward the viewer) in every frame.
The stride must visibly alternate across the frames instead of repeating one static pose.
Do not draw floor shadows, dust, or motion trails.
Proportion-appropriate motion for semi-realistic build: balanced stylized anatomy, moderate realistic stride.

states.name: walk-up
states.action: Facing-up walk cycle: alternating stride through legs and arms only, viewed from behind. Proportion-appropriate motion for semi-realistic build: balanced stylized anatomy, moderate realistic stride.
requirements: Character faces and moves straight up (away from the viewer, back visible) in every frame.
The stride must visibly alternate across the frames instead of repeating one static pose.
Do not draw floor shadows, dust, or motion trails.
Proportion-appropriate motion for semi-realistic build: balanced stylized anatomy, moderate realistic stride.

states.name: walk-right
states.action: Rightward walk cycle: alternating stride through legs and arms only, viewed from the side. Proportion-appropriate motion for semi-realistic build: balanced stylized anatomy, moderate realistic stride.
requirements: The row must unmistakably face and travel right, viewed from the side.
The stride must visibly alternate across the frames instead of repeating one static pose.
Do not draw floor shadows, dust, or motion trails.
Avoid asymmetric costume details, insignia, or text so the mirrored row stays plausible.
Proportion-appropriate motion for semi-realistic build: balanced stylized anatomy, moderate realistic stride.

states.name: walk-left
states.action: Leftward walk cycle: alternating stride through legs and arms only, viewed from the side. Proportion-appropriate motion for semi-realistic build: balanced stylized anatomy, moderate realistic stride.
requirements: The row must unmistakably face and travel left, viewed from the side.
The stride must visibly alternate across the frames instead of repeating one static pose.
Do not draw floor shadows, dust, or motion trails.
Avoid asymmetric costume details, insignia, or text so the mirrored row stays plausible.
Proportion-appropriate motion for semi-realistic build: balanced stylized anatomy, moderate realistic stride.
